title: Assemble report
description: Read the following 6 HTML table files from the `smoke_output/` directory: - `smoke_output/qwen_table.html` - `smoke_output/gemini_table.html` - `smoke_output/claude_table.html` - `smoke_output/minimax_table.html` - `smoke_output/codex_table.html` - `smoke_output/glm_table.html` Combine them into a single complete HTML page at `smoke_output/report.html` with: 1. A proper HTML5 document structure (``, ``, ``, ``) 2. Title: "Full Harness Smoke Test Report" (both in `` and as an `<h1>` on the page) 3. All 6 tables arranged vertically in the order listed above, each preceded by an `<h2>` heading identifying which agent generated it 4. Include the inline CSS from each table file as-is (scope them if needed to avoid conflicts) 5. Add a **Summary** section at the bottom with an `<h2>CSS Quality Ratings</h2>` heading 6. In the summary, rate each table's CSS quality out of 10 based on: use of color theme, readability, border styling, hover effects, spacing/padding, and overall visual polish. Present ratings in a simple table with columns: Agent, Rating (/10), Comments 7. Add basic page-level CSS for body font, max-width centering, and spacing between sections Write the assembled file to: `smoke_output/report.html`

metadata.reasoning: Assembly task requiring reading 6 files and combining them with quality assessment. Gemini is low-cost with good remaining quota, assigned per the spec. Medium complexity due to file coordination and CSS evaluation.
